problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biomimetic. Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
